layout.name: length
layout.title: Length
layout.tooltip: Number of the initial firebal tails. If it reach 0, the Flame Chomp explodes.

layout.name: respawns
layout.title: Respawns?
layout.tooltip: If checked, this NPC will respawn a set time after it is defeated.

layout.name: respawndelay
layout.title: Respawn Delay
layout.tooltip: Number of seconds after which the Flame Chomp should respawn.
